summary: Alley Boss, a rising star in the Arena, has successfully reached rank 2 and triggered a rare Colosseum quest titled 'Undefeated King,' which requires him to defeat the current rank 1 player, Rain. As the match begins, spectators shower Alley Boss with donations, while Rain attempts a surprise blitz using hidden skills and buff combinations. Alley Boss effortlessly counters by receiving powerful buffs from his companion Tangy and launches a decisive retaliatory strike.
key_moments: Alley Boss reaches rank 2 after defeating Taeka.
A rare Colosseum quest, 'Undefeated King,' is issued to Alley Boss, pitting him against the rank 1 player, Rain.
Rain attempts a high-speed, surprise attack, but Alley Boss receives powerful buffs from Tangy and initiates a counter-offensive.
